_cite.reason: URL-normalization 1c: strip trailing markdown-emphasis `*`/backtick glued to citation URLs in intelligence_item_sections.content_md (customer-checkable link + validate_item_provenance criterion-2 exact-compare). Operator ruling 2026-07-04. Same transform as the write-site fix.

prior.content_md:
- **1 July 2016** — Biosecurity Act 2014 (Qld) commenced, replacing previous fragmented biosecurity legislation *(in force as of 1 July 2016)*. *Source: DPI Queensland. https://www.dpi.qld.gov.au/business-priorities/biosecurity/policy-legislation-regulation/biosecurity-act-2014*
- **1 May 2025** — Trusts Act 2025 (Qld) passed by Queensland Parliament and received royal assent *(in force as of assent date for passage; commencement delayed)*. *Source: QLS Proctor, March 2026. https://www.qlsproctor.com.au/2026/03/trusts-act-2025-commencement-nears/*
- **25 March 2026** — Regional Planning Interests (Condamine Alluvium) and Other Legislation Amendment Bill 2026 introduced to Queensland Parliament *(in force as of introduction date)*. *Source: Planning QLD. https://www.planning.qld.gov.au/planning-framework/legislation/regional-planning-interests-condamine-alluvium-and-other-legislation-amendment-bill-2026*
- **13 April 2026** — Closing date for written submissions on the Regional Planning Interests (Condamine Alluvium) Bill *(in force as of closure date)*. *Source: Sparke Helmore, April 2026. https://www.sparke.com.au/insights/regional-planning-interests-condamine-alluvium-and-other-legislation-amendment-bill-2026/*
- **27 April 2026** — Updated prohibited and restricted matter lists commenced under the Biosecurity Regulation 2016 *(in force as of 27 April 2026)*. *Source: DPI Engagement Hub, 2026. https://dpi.engagementhub.com.au/biosecurity-prohibited-restricted-matter*
- **28 April 2026** — Trusts Act 2025 (Qld) commenced by proclamation; Trusts Act 1973 (Qld) repealed; Trusts Regulation 2026 also in effect *(in force as of 28 April 2026)*. *Source: Rose Litigation, 28 April 2026. https://www.roselitigation.com.au/knowledge-centre/queenslands-new-trusts-act-what-trustees-beneficiaries-and-advisors-need-to-know/*
- **8 May 2026** — Primary Industries and Resources Committee tabled Report No. 19 on the Regional Planning Interests (Condamine Alluvium) and Other Legislation Amendment Bill 2026 *(in force as of tabling)*. *Source: Queensland Parliament Committee. https://www.parliament.qld.gov.au/Work-of-Committees/Committees/Committee-Details?cid=0&id=8574*
- **22 May 2026** — Environmental and Other Legislation Amendment Regulation 2026 commenced; updated ERA standards (version 3), fauna/flora species reclassifications *(in force as of 22 May 2026)*. *Source: Dept of Environment, Tourism, Science and Innovation, QLD, May 2026. https://environment.qld.gov.au/management/policy-regulation/changes*
- **29 May 2026** — Biosecurity Regulation 2016 sunset review consultation closes at 5:00 pm AEST *(deadline today)*. *Source: DPI Engagement Hub, 2026. https://dpi.engagementhub.com.au/biosecurity-regulation-review*
- **~8 August 2026** — Queensland Government response due to Primary Industries and Resources Committee Report No. 19 on the Condamine Alluvium Bill (3 months from 8 May 2026 tabling) *(conditional on no extension)*. *Source: Queensland Parliament. https://www.parliament.qld.gov.au/Work-of-Committees/Committees/Committee-Details?cid=0&id=8574*
- **TBC 2026** — Replacement Queensland Biosecurity Regulation to be made following sunset review; commencement date not yet announced *(conditional on consultation outcomes and drafting timeline)*. *Source: DPI Queensland. https://dpi.engagementhub.com.au/biosecurity-regulation-review*
